findings.evidence: The theorem statement at lines 127-129 is `min (P.characteristicLowerFaceExponent k x S v) (P.characteristicUpperFaceExponent k x S hv) = 0`; `CubeFace.lean:13` describes these as the two faces of a cube in a direction.
findings.fix: Rephrase this as a statement about the two opposite faces in direction `v` (or explicitly restrict the endpoint language to the 1-cube case).
findings.issue: The docstring says the theorem records that "an edge of the cube never carries a positive `U`-power on both endpoints", but the theorem is about the lower and upper codimension-one faces for an arbitrary direction `v ∈ S`, not about endpoints except in the 1-dimensional case.

summary: The new file has module and declaration docstrings, but the face-exponent documentation overstates the theorem by translating a codimension-one face statement into an endpoint/edge statement.
